<!-- Thanks for contributing to Voica! -->

## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Related

Closes #… (issue), or links to the discussion.

## Behavior & spec

- [ ] No behavior change, **or** it matches [docs/CORE-SPEC.md](../docs/CORE-SPEC.md) (cite the § section)
- [ ] If cross-platform behavior changed, the spec was updated first (parity rule)

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build Voica.sln -c Debug` is clean (no new warnings)
- [ ] `Voica.exe --test-all` passes, and I added checks for any new pure logic
- [ ] I manually smoke-tested the affected UI/flow
- [ ] Code style matches the surrounding files
